title: 10 best herbal teas for nausea
description: Matricaria chamomilla, also known as chamomile, teas helps with nausea because of its soothing and calming properties. The apigenin and luteolin present in chamomile teas interact with the brain's GABA receptors, promoting relaxation and reducing anxiety. This leads to a decrease in stomach contractions, alleviating nausea and discomfort. Additionally, chamomile's anti-inflammatory properties may also contribute to its nausea-relieving effects by reducing inflammation in the digestive ...
